note: Honest inventory from repo + Saved/Audit logs. GN_UniversalScatter and GN_RockGenerator are NOT built.

lanes.title: Surreal Architecture Generator
lanes.summary: ~38k-line addon building GeometryNodeTree graphs at runtime. Primary portfolio GN proof: zen shrine axis, Escher greybox, gothic/romanesque kits, DistributePointsOnFaces scatter.

steps.name: apply_geometry_nodes_to_object
steps.detail: Creates SurrealArch_{obj} node tree + modifier on mesh.

steps.name: Catalog dispatch
steps.detail: 100+ arch types: GB_ZEN_*, GB_ESCHER_*, towers, domes, props.

steps.name: Greybox subgraphs
steps.detail: surreal_greybox/ — MeshCube, boolean, curve primitives.

steps.name: UE export
steps.detail: snap_export.py trim groups + UE payload from GN output.

steps.name: Portfolio capture
steps.detail: Viewport + graph screenshots for geometry-nodes.html.

lanes.title: RoofGeneratorPro SHED / BUTTERFLY
lanes.summary: Only SHED (8 nodes) and BUTTERFLY (9 nodes) are true procedural GN. All other roof types use a 2-node pass-through wrapper over bmesh output.

steps.name: use_geonode flag
steps.detail: FromageRoof_GN modifier on roof mesh.

steps.name: SHED / BUTTERFLY
steps.detail: Procedural slope + valley logic in GN.

steps.name: Other roofs
steps.detail: bmesh roof → Input→Output pass-through (v3.3 baseline).

steps.name: validate_gn.py
steps.detail: Headless validation enforces procedural for SHED/BUTTERFLY.

steps.name: Future
steps.detail: Expand procedural GN beyond pass-through for gable/hip types.

lanes.title: Higgsas node group bridge
lanes.summary: Appends NT* node groups from external Higgsas Geo Node Groups v13.blend (G:\programs\BlenderPlugins\). Live code, graphs not in repo.

steps.name: Lazy load blend
steps.detail: higgsas_bridge loads external .blend on demand.

steps.name: Apply bricks
steps.detail: higgsas_apply_bricks adds brick surface modifier.

steps.name: Dependency
steps.detail: Requires local BlenderPlugins install.

steps.name: Portfolio
steps.detail: Document as external dependency, not owned GN.

steps.name: Capture
steps.detail: Screenshot NTBricks Grid in use if available.

lanes.title: Universal + style PCG graphs
lanes.summary: setup_pcg_universal.py rebuilt graphs 2026-07-09. MeadowBloom, RockScatter, wall moss/lichen/ivy, Sakura petal drift, Escher rooms, Cosmic orbit scatter.

steps.name: Graph build
steps.detail: setup_pcg_universal.py — 13+ style graphs + wall suite.

steps.name: Rock scatter
steps.detail: build_universal_rock_scatter.py — sidesteps broken wire_scatter_chain.

steps.name: WP pillars
steps.detail: setup_wp_pillar_levels.py assigns volumes per L_WP_* level.

steps.name: ISM verify
steps.detail: 9,913 total ISM across four pillars (audit 2026-07-09).

steps.name: Capture
steps.detail: pcg_l_wp_* plates into portfolio_package.json.

lanes.title: Math structures + terrain block-in
lanes.summary: generate_math_structures.py — 13 catalog structures. Only SM_Math_MobiusStrip baked (1,344 tris). WP terrains use Perlin GeometryScript seeds.

steps.name: Parametric bake
steps.detail: DynamicMesh → StaticMesh via GeometryScript APIs.

steps.name: Catalog
steps.detail: Docs/GEOMETRYSCRIPT_MATH_CATALOG.md — torus knot, epitrochoid, gyroid, etc.

steps.name: Audit
steps.detail: geometryscript_meshes.json tracks bake status.

steps.name: Terrain
steps.detail: SM_Terrain_* MeshTerrain_Seed on all four WP pillars.

steps.name: NightShift
steps.detail: MI preview spheres → sdf-material-gallery.html.

lanes.title: GN_UniversalScatter / GN_RockGenerator
lanes.summary: Technical sheets exist but no .blend files, no Python builders, no committed graphs. Rock scatter is implemented in UE PCG instead.

steps.name: Honest label
steps.detail: Mark sheets as planned until Blender assets exist.

steps.name: Redirect proof
steps.detail: Point rock story to build_universal_rock_scatter.py.

steps.name: Redirect scatter
steps.detail: Point scatter story to SurrealArch DistributePointsOnFaces + UE PCG.

steps.name: Build or retire
steps.detail: Either create GN_UniversalScatter in Blender or remove from nav.

steps.name: terrain_gn.py
steps.detail: World-loop backlog — file does not exist yet.
